'''Loader droids''' were a type of [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droids]] designed to load and handle cargo being transported on Imperial [[Starship/Legends|ships]], such as the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Suprosa]]''.

==Characteristics==
The Imperial loader [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was an effective labor machine with a vaguely-[[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] upper half used to manipulate cargo. It was propelled by a large lower half.
Tall and imposing, the loader trundled along slowly, but possessed extremely long, spring-loaded arms that could be potentially dangerous in combat. Size of the models varied depending on the particular need of a starship.

[[File:Robot_2.jpg| thumb|left|200px|View of the loader droid's telescoping arms.]]

==History==
These droids were utilized by various factions, especially the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and the [[Imperial Remnant]]. [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] hero [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]] encountered an especially enormous version on the Imperial freighter, ''[[Suprosa]]''. Jedi [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] also witnessed the use of these droids by the [[Lumini pirates/Legends|Lumini Pirates]] during their pillaging of a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Blockade runner|escort ship]].

{{Droid-stub}}
